name: gpt-pro-web-review
description: Chrome-backed ChatGPT Pro web review workflow for large project review bundles.

interface.shortDescription: Run Chrome-backed ChatGPT Pro project reviews.
interface.longDescription: Provides a home-local Codex skill and gpt-review command for read-only project reviews through ChatGPT web in Chrome. It prepares review bundles, uploads them to a fixed ChatGPT Project, supports watch and detach/resume modes, keeps remote files as archive, deletes local upload zips after confirmed upload, and runs parallel review tabs with safe cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Use GPT Pro to review this project plan.
Prepare a GPT Pro web review bundle for this repository.
Resume the detached GPT Pro review and extract the result.
